resources.string: 该账号已在其他设备登录
安装的游戏收纳在游戏空间，随时畅玩
管理儿童空间中宝贝可使用的应用
下载儿童空间中宝贝可使用的应用
请安装最新版游戏中心
需要以下权限才能继续
请更新到最新版本，否则无法正常使用
请在设置中找到-%s，进入安装未知应用页面，打开允许来自此来源的应用选项
开启后，来电时需要家长解锁后才能接听
在使用过程中，本应用需要访问相机权限，用于屏幕距离检测功能。如果您不同意调用以上权限，将导致该功能无法正常使用，但不影响您使用本应用的其他功能。您可以随时通过关闭“屏幕距离检测”功能，取消以上权限调用并撤回您的同意。
用于检测屏幕距离，保护儿童视力
通话中不可启用儿童空间
通话中不可删除儿童空间
通话中不可进入儿童空间
通话中不可退出儿童空间
亲情守护中禁止切换分身
关闭密码后，初始空间中的密码也将停用。并将删除已录入的指纹和人脸数据，您将无法使用指纹，人脸识别及设备保护功能
是否开启系统设置权限
开启后将生成一个桌面图标，用于快速进入儿童空间
为提供完整功能，需要联网及调用以下权限：读写设备上的照片及文件、拍摄照片和录制视频。您可以随时前往权限管理调整所有权限的授权情况。
" 请您阅读并同意我们的《用户协议》 《隐私政策》与《儿童信息保护规则》。 "
“小游戏”为您提供无需下载、即点即玩的游戏体验。
查看完整版本《用户协议》《隐私政策》
"三方SDK授权部分： 增加快手SDK用于播放短视频，因此需要提供给三方SDK您的MAC地址信息"
我们升级了隐私协议，主要内容如下
用于存储一些数据信息
新的在玩小游戏会自动收纳至「继续玩」小部件，您可以找到全网在玩小游戏
是否为您开启小游戏自动收纳
新的在玩小游戏会自动收纳至【继续玩】组件，您可以找到全网在玩小游戏
已为您自动收纳至桌面
Tap the stars to rate this app
You can leave a comment as well.
Every account deserves its own app
Data provided by Chengdu Hi-tech Disaster Reduction Institute
%s km (Epicenter is far from you. You might not sense the earthquake.)
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
屏幕颜色和亮度自动调节，保护宝贝视力
为保护孩子的眼睛，离屏幕太近时，会主动提醒

Fastboot is the traditional method to flash Mi devices. When the device is in Fastboot mode, all the data stored on it can be reached and erased directly. We lock Fastboot to make sure your data stays secure in case you lose the device, as well as to guarantee the reliability of Find device features.

"In case you lose your device, Fastboot guarantees the security of the items stored on it. If you unlock Fastboot, you will no longer be able to lock your device remotely or erase data using Find device. That's why we don't recommend unlocking Fastboot on your device."

"You should use the unlock tool from Xiaomi. To unlock the device, we need to make sure that the device belongs to you. That's why you should sign in with your Xiaomi Account and turn on Find device."
Are there any risks related to unlocking Fastboot?
I know about the risks, but I still need to unlock my device. What should I do?
Go to the official website to get the unlock tool.
Boost up your gaming experience and win a game skin. This offer is only available today!
Boost up your gaming experience and win a Xiaomi device!
Allow Security to connect to the network in order to use all features of Game Turbo?
Allow Security to connect to the network in order to use all features of Game Turbo?
Higher swipe response increases the speed of reaction to this gesture, while lower swipe response makes the gesture more stable.
Higher sensitivity to continuous taps increases the speed of reaction to this gesture, while lower sensitivity makes the gesture more stable.
Higher aiming accuracy makes smaller swipes more precise, while lower aiming accuracy makes this gesture more stable.
Higher tap stability makes taps more stable, while lower tap stability increases the accuracy of smaller swipes.
*This mode is designed for professional players. Regular players might find this mode inconvenient.
Reduce touch sensitivity near the edges to avoid triggering touch controls. Hold your device by the highlighted areas to keep speakers uncovered.
Increase contrast and enhance details for games
Vibrate during shots in the game
Vibrate during kills in the game
You can only use one game in Light speed mode. Replace \"%s\" now?
Current GPU settings are applied to \"%s\". Relaunch the game to apply settings.
"Touch controls have been updated. Now you can find the related features in Gaming shortcuts > Enhanced touch controls while you're playing games."
Give clarity to distant surface textures that are seen at an angle
Highest available anti-aliasing rate is defined by the specific game
Highest available frame rate is defined by the specific game
Optimize graphics to boost the GPU performance and save power. This feature is supported by selected games.
Enhance picture clarity by optimizing the textures of remote objects
Use multithreaded rendering to optimize game performance
"Default resolution is defined by the specific game. Some games don't allow to adjust resolution."
"This app can't be used on the outer screen"
To be able to use this feature, change display resolution to WQHD+ in Settings.
"Can't recommend games right now due to a network error. Check your network settings and try again."

string.name: gdpr_msg
string.Data: "In order to use the basic features of Security, you must agree that Xiaomi will collect, process, and use your personal data, including information about the ways you use Security's features (e.g., mobile data usage stats, info about malware, as well as basic info about your device) and other types of information specified in our Privacy Policy."

resources.string: "Couldn't get data. Check your network settings and try again."
开启自动优选5G网络，降低游戏延迟、平衡续航功耗
设置过滤级别，优化纹理清晰度与性能
设置最大采样数，平衡画质锯齿与性能
限制游戏最高帧率，平衡流畅度与功耗
优化驱动参数验证，提升性能、降低功耗；部分应用可能因依赖验证层出现未定义行为
优化远距离纹理模糊，提升画面清晰度
开启多线程渲染，优化游戏运行效能
默认沿用游戏当前分辨率，部分游戏不支持调节
选择过滤模式，平衡纹理清晰度与性能
合理分配硬件资源，在保障画质的前提下提升性能
"提示： 1.当前设置仅作用于当前应用,若应用正在后台运行则需要重启应用后生效。 2.低参数值可降低功耗,但对画质有一定影响。"
接通后自动开启免提通话，无需跳转通话页面，游戏体验不中断
任意SIM卡在特定5G网络服下，游戏中来电不会停用数据网络；如果双卡均未在5G网络服务下，非数据卡来电时将会自动拒接；该功能仅支持中国大陆运营商、5G-SA驻网。
页面加载失败，请稍后重试
在空闲时段自动下载游戏资源
当前设备暂不支持性能设置
降低Wi-Fi延迟与抖动，搭配小米/红米路由器可启用专属加速，体验更稳定
由迅游加速提供支持，提高网络稳定性
感谢您一直以来的信任！迅游手游加速器将会收集您的小米账号ID用于记录加速服务会员时长，以为您提供更好的游戏网络体验。
即将跳转迅游网络加速服务
已阅读并同意迅游加速器
由迅游加速提供支持，提高网络稳定性
由迅游加速提供支持，提高网络稳定性
由迅游加速提供支持，提高网络稳定性
由迅游加速提供支持，提高网络稳定性
"You're about to use Xunyou Game Booster. This service will collect your Xiaomi Account ID to record your membership duration."

string.name: gtb_dialog_privacy_speed_tips
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to Xunyou Game Booster Privacy Policy."

string.name: gtb_dialog_privacy_speed_tips_new
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to the Xunyou Game Booster Privacy Policy."

resources.string: "You're about to use Xunyou Game Voice Changer. This service will collect your Xiaomi Account ID to record your membership duration."

string.name: gtb_dialog_privacy_voice_tips
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to Xunyou Game Voice Changer Privacy Policy."

resources.string: 开启并前往游戏空间查看
开启并前往游戏空间启动
已安装及新装游戏均收纳至游戏空间，可在设置或桌面移除，移除后图标恢复桌面。
开启后将安装的游戏收纳至游戏空间，可在设置或桌面移除，移除后图标恢复桌面。
此游戏已收纳至游戏空间，可在设置或桌面移除，移除后图标恢复桌面。
《%s》已收纳至游戏空间，可在设置或桌面移除，移除后图标恢复桌面。
将此游戏收纳至游戏空间，可在设置或桌面移除，移除后图标恢复桌面。
将《%s》收纳至游戏空间，可在设置或桌面移除，移除后图标恢复桌面。
通过游戏空间-设置或桌面可移除小部件，移除后游戏图标会释放回桌面。
家长全面掌握和管理宝贝使用情况
"精选专属定制童趣应用 安全优质，陪伴成长"
全方位覆盖双语、动画、儿歌等早教内容
"防短信扣费、流量超标、电话漏接 安全有保障"
游戏自动收纳至小部件，无需翻找
游戏加速升级为游戏空间
恢复将移除该小部件，并将已收纳的游戏释放回桌面。
添加游戏空间收纳小部件成功，桌面游戏统和新安装的游戏会自动收纳。
查看最新《手机管家隐私政策》
视力保护 时间管理
儿童应用 趣味益智
海量内容 知识学堂
宝贝开心 家长放心
有未接电话哦，请爸爸妈妈查看
确认关闭后%d天内不再推荐。若需永久关闭，请前往【设置-全局设置-游戏推荐】操作。
"您已多次关闭推荐模块,是否需要永久关闭？ 永久关闭后将不再展示推荐,如需重新开启,可前往【设置-全局设置-游戏推荐】操作。"
确定关闭游戏推荐模块？
当前非WIFI网络，请注意流量消耗
开启来电验证需要先设置主空间锁屏密码，用以来电时解锁。
家长全面管控宝贝使用情况
为宝贝专属定制童趣应用
全方位覆盖双语、动画、儿歌等早教内容
小米儿童空间隐私政策
视力保护 时间管理
儿童应用 陪伴成长
海量内容 知识学堂
是否允许小游戏访问您的系统小米账号?
请勾选相关服务协议后重试
您的账号暂未绑定密码,请使用手机+验证码登录
网络异常，请确保网络稳定后，再试
请输入正确短信验证码
验证码获取失败,请重试
验证码发送失败:请检查本机时间是否正确/是否使用代理/是否被监听等
微信绑定已超过频次限制,请使用其他方式登录
小米账号/手机号码/邮箱
未安装微信客户端，请先下载安装
小米账号登陆失败，已为您自动切换至账号登陆

string.name: login_mi_user_agreement
string.Data: 已阅读并同意系统账号的《用户协议》 和 《隐私政策》，小游戏账号的 《用户协议》 和 《隐私政策》

string.name: login_user_agreement
string.Data: 已阅读并同意《用户协议》 和 《隐私政策》

string.name: login_verify_code_failed
string.Data: 没有收到验证码？重新获取

resources.string: Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
儿童空间已经升级到最新版本，新增使用时段控制等功能，需到设置重新打开才可使用
儿童空间新增使用时段控制等功能，请升级到最新版本体验全新功能
注销小游戏账号后，小游戏账号及相关数据将无法再找回，您是否确认要注销小游戏账号？
注销小游戏账号后，您将无法使用该账号继续登录小游戏或找回该账号下的任何小游戏数据。请谨慎操作。
默认头像暂无数据，请稍后重试
真实头像昵称更快结识游戏同好
用于上传/修改头像，发布多媒体文件
关闭个性化推荐后，我们将无法为您推荐更符合您喜好的游戏。
用于获取设备识别码，用于保障账号安全
撤销隐私授权并清除本机数据
用于上传/修改头像，发布多媒体文件
需要手机的存储权限才能继续
本功能需要相机权限，用于上传/修改头像，发布多媒体文件
本功能需要读取手机上的储存权限，用于修改头像，发布保存媒体文件等用途
游戏图标平铺在桌面，不收纳
游戏图标收纳至文件夹，桌面更清爽
游戏图标彻底隐藏，可在游戏空间启动游戏
Tap to switch to selecting a day
Tap to switch to selecting a year
Network speed boost session is about to end
Network speed boost session is about to end
Network speed boost session ended. You might start experiencing network delays. Renew the session now?
Get a free game booster and enter to win a Xiaomi phone!
网络不可用，请检查联网后再试
管理宝贝在儿童空间内的网络使用
每日数据流量使用上限
每日流量达到上限值时，系统会主动关闭流量，您无需担心流量超额导致的扣费
初次创建儿童空间时，需要连接网络以载入儿童空间内的相关内容和服务，请您前往开启移动网络或Wi-Fi网络。
Set your system screen resolution to WQHD+ in Settings before you continue.
健康使用，保护孩子的视力
为孩子挑选优秀的早教应用
管理宝贝在儿童空间内的使用时间
禁用时间间隔需大于30分钟
选择宝贝喜欢的默认桌面
选择儿童空间桌面显示内容和方式
管理宝贝在儿童空间内的网络使用
防止宝贝随意退出儿童空间
解锁后将开放%s分钟使用时长
Create a Xiaomi Account via your phone number %s now?
Name must be longer than %d characters
This nickname is invalid. Try a different one.
This photo is invalid. Try a different one.
This email address is already associated with another Xiaomi Account.
The email address you entered is invalid.
The text you entered is too long
"You haven't set the password yet. Sign in with SMS."
Too many verification codes have been sent to this number. Try again later.
The username you entered is invalid
This phone number is already associated with another Xiaomi Account.
Too many attempts. Wait a minute or two and try again.
Too many verification codes have been sent to this number. Wait 24 hours and try again.
"We'll use this email to verify your account"
A network error occurred. Check your network settings and try again.
Check the URL and try again, or copy the URL and open it in your browser.
"Couldn't connect to the network. Try again."
Too many accounts have been associated with this number. Try a different one.
You need to sign in again

"We shall protect your personal information in accordance with the relevant laws and regulations. This app needs the following permissions to work normally:

Using camera (for setting your profile photo)

If you don't agree to grant such permissions, you won't be able to use some features of this app; however, its basic functionality will still be available to you. You can always restrict permissions or revoke your authorization in the Settings."
A network error occurred. Check your network settings and try again.
A system error occurred. Go back and try again.
This app needs to access selected Gallery items to be able to set your profile photo. Allow now?
"You've requested too many verification emails. Make sure that the verification email isn't in your inbox's Spam folder."
"Can't be the same as current password"
Too many verification codes have been sent to this number. Wait 24 hours and try again.
Add your phone number to protect your account.
Session expired. Sign in again to reconnect this account.
Too many attempts. Try other ways to sign in.
System is busy. Wait a minute or two and try again.
"The service isn't available. Make sure the app is installed and not blocked."
Check your network settings and try again

string.name: passport_user_agreement_hint_3rd_app
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to User Agreement and Privacy Policy and Xiaomi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy."

string.name: passport_user_agreement_hint_3rd_app_mobile
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to User Agreement and Privacy Policy, Xiaomi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of China Mobile verification services."

string.Data: "I've read and agreed to User Agreement and Privacy Policy, Xiaomi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of eSurfing account verification services."

string.Data: "I've read and agreed to Xiaomi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy."

resources.string: Your WhatsApp verification code will be sent to your recovery phone (<font color=#1F93FF>%s</font>).
The code you entered is incorrect
The format of the phone number you entered is invalid
The code you entered is incorrect
The code you entered is incorrect
初始空间锁屏密码将会用于退出儿童空间时进行验证
设置退出儿童空间的密码
退出儿童模式需要验证密码，如设有锁屏密码，退出时需要验证锁屏密码
"Your device is out of battery and has entered Hibernation mode. Apps will run in the background and won't send notifications."
"Your device is almost out of battery. In Hibernation mode, you won't receive any notifications from the apps that are working in the background."
"In Hibernation mode, apps will run in the background and won't send notifications"
Your device is out of battery. If you exit Hibernation mode, your device will turn off.
Charge your device as soon as possible.
To extend battery life, usage of some apps may be restricted.
Hibernation mode has been on for %1$s %2$s.
Your device is charging. Hibernation mode is off.
Turned on Ultra battery saver to ensure satellite communications
Battery is too low. Tiantong Satellite communications will be turned off along with Ultra battery saver. Turn off anyway?
请选择关闭个性化服务原因
开启后我们将为您推荐个性化游戏内容
"Your phone number and carrier details will be encrypted and uploaded to Mi's servers to get more info about data purchasing options."
游戏空间主页展示推荐游戏卡片
"儿童空间的隐私政策发生如下更新 %s 请您阅读并同意更新后的%s。"
您将撤回对儿童空间隐私政策的同意
如果您撤回对儿童空间隐私政策的同意，我们将按照法律规定删除该应用所收集的数据，空间内所有数据将丢失且无法恢复。如您撤回同意，则视为您不同意我们继续向您提供儿童空间服务。是否撤回同意？
禁用儿童空间，空间内的所有数据将丢失且无法恢复。确定要禁用儿童空间吗？
建议您设置初始空间锁屏密码，设置后，退出儿童模式时将会验证锁屏密码。宝贝不可随意进入您的主空间
设置退出儿童模式密码
欢快的背景音乐让宝贝获得更多乐趣
"%s falsify area, Represents the height[%.1fdp] of drag at run time, It does not show anything."
The content view in SmartRefreshLayout is empty. Do you forget to add it in xml layout file?
Can make a satellite call for ≈%1$s %2$s
Connect the charger as soon as possible
Third party apps normally consume more power than system apps. Add anyway?
You can add up to %d items to frequently used apps
Fifth day of Chinese New Year
Fourth day of Chinese New Year
Second day of Chinese New Year
Seventh day of Chinese New Year
Sixth day of Chinese New Year
Third day of Chinese New Year
亲情守护只支持在初始空间使用，请切换到初始空间使用此功能。
管理宝贝在儿童空间内的时间使用
开启时间管理需要先设置主空间锁屏密码，用以家长解锁。
无网络连接，请稍后重试
删除儿童空间失败，请稍后再试
可在游戏中呼出，提供游戏场景下的便捷功能
请更新到最新版本，否则无法正常使用
您需要同意%s我们才能继续为您提供服务。您是否同意更新后的隐私政策？
用于上传图片，发布多媒体文件
You need to sign in again
需要手机的存储权限才能继续
本功能需要相机权限，用于上传图片，发布多媒体文件
本功能需要读取手机上的储存权限，用于上传图片，发布保存媒体文件等用途
正在切换到文件夹模式
删除小部件后，游戏图标已平铺桌面。重新开启收纳，可一键整理，让桌面更整洁。
删除小部件后，游戏图标已平铺至桌面。后续可在游戏空间重新开启收纳，一键整理游戏图标，让桌面更整洁。
